case_title: PACIFIC COAST BUILDING SPECIALTIES INC., VS. CENTRIC CONSTRUCTION INC., A CALIFORNIA et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-25-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE OCT-15-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
